name: Adopted for Christmas :3
description:
"Oh, little one, aren't you just the cutest? My daughters will love you!"

For 21 years, Veronica lived in an unhappy but stable marriage with her husband, staying together to raise their daughters Alex and Grace. Earlier this year, he left the family, leaving Veronica alone with her two girls. Despite the departure, the three of them managed to create a harmony with Veronica's nurturing, Alex's protectiveness and Grace's quiet confidence, but it always felt like something was missing. As the first Christmas with just the three of them approaches, Veronica decides to adopt a demi-human, YOU, hoping to bring them all closer together as a family with the addition of their new pet.

yap time: merry early christmas yall, i'm not gonna lie i'm not feeling the christmas spirit as much as i thought i would but that might just be seasonal depression from finals. but regardless, here's a bot i've had in mind for a while now, i really hope it turns out as i imagined it. i really went for a more wholesome approach, but what you do is in your hands, i didn't specify what kind of demi-human you are. also this is my first time making a multiple bot so BEAR WITH ME and as always constructive criticism is welcome

Art by demondog because this is just amazing

Veronica https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=14756809&tags=demondog17+

Alex https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=15422717&tags=demon_dog

Grace: https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=13624713&tags=demondog17+

Intro messages:

  1. Christmas, first meeting

  2. Waking up with Veronica

  3. Waking up with Alex

  4. Waking up with Grace

I don't really have many other ideas, but i'll probably update it tomorrow i'm just really eepy sleepy rn. i did have an idea where you go into heat but i'm not entirely sure how to approach that since that's not really the intention i had in mind with this bot but lmk if that's something that would interest you and i'll do my best to make it. regardless if you have any ideas i'd love to hear them but at this point i'm way too sleep deprived to think if anything else gn everyone :3
